testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.ratingDesc: Elite Barbershop is rated 4.9 stars from 462 Google reviews for its impeccable service and luxurious atmosphere

footer.tagline: Since 2024, Elite Barbershop has been the master of men's style in Laval

visit.title: Visit Elite Barbershop
visit.subtitle: Since 2024, Elite Barbershop has been the master of men's style in Laval

q1.a: We operate by appointment only. Please book online so we can guarantee a slot at the time that suits you best.

q2.q: How long does a haircut usually take?
q2.a: On average, a haircut takes 30 to 45 minutes, depending on the service. We always take the time needed for a flawless result.

q3.a: We ask for at least 12 hours' notice for any change or cancellation. That lets us offer the freed-up slot to another client. Thank you for understanding.

q4.q: What payment methods do you accept?
q4.a: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Interac debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and cash. Tipping is appreciated.
